# CE4011 basic example: simply supported beam with a downward full-span UDL.
# Left support is pinned; right support is a roller.
# Units are SI: m, N, Pa.

MATERIAL steel E=200000000000 alpha=1.2e-5
SECTION beam A=0.02 I=8e-5 d=0.4

NODE 1 0 0 FIX FIX FREE
NODE 2 5 0 FREE FIX FREE

FRAME 1 1 2 steel beam
MEMBER_LOAD 1 TYPE=UDL DIR=LOCAL_Y W=-10000
